title: crotalaria hirta
intro: Crotalaria hirta, also known as hairy rattlebox or hairy needle bush, is a flowering plant in the legume family native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. The health benefits of Crotalaria hirta include its potential to treat various health conditions, such as fever, cough, and skin infections. The herbal preparation of Crotalaria hirta can be made into a tea or infusion by steeping its leaves and flowers in hot water, or by using it as a powder or extract in traditional medicine.
